commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]

target.title: fix(ui): adopt inFlightRun on Control UI history reload
target.body:
## Summary

What problem does this PR solve?

- Control UI loses the in-progress assistant response when the user navigates away from a running chat session and returns; only the last committed user message is shown even though the gateway run is still active.

Why does this matter now?

- Issue #90755: session reconnect state drifts from the gateway's active run in the web UI, causing user-visible message loss and idle appearance during live runs.

What is the intended outcome?

- Control UI adopts the existing `chat.history` `inFlightRun` contract (already used by TUI) on history reload, rehydrating `chatRunId` / `chatStream` so partial assistant text or a reading indicator appears after switch-back.

What is intentionally out of scope?

- No gateway contract changes, no active tool-call replay extension, no CHANGELOG edit, no unrelated UI refactors.

What does success look like?

- After `loadChatHistory`, when the gateway reports an in-flight run, the Control UI shows buffered assistant text or a reading indicator and continues receiving live deltas for that run.

What should reviewers focus on?

- `ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.ts` (`adoptInFlightRunFromChatHistory` + call site after stream reset)
- `ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.test.ts` (`loadChatHistory inFlightRun adoption`)

## Linked context

Which issue does this close?

Closes #90755

Which issues, PRs, or discussions are related?

Related #90755 (ClawSweeper queueable-fix / fix-shape-clear / source-repro)

Was this requested by a maintainer or owner?

- ClawSweeper marked queueable with Best possible solution: adopt existing `inFlightRun` in Control UI, mirror TUI.

## Real behavior proof (required for external PRs)

- Behavior or issue addressed: Control UI ignores `inFlightRun` from `chat.history` on session switch-back.
- Real environment tested: Local checkout on `fix/issue-90755-inflight-run`; vitest mocks `chat.history` response with `inFlightRun`.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.test.ts
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/app-gateway.node.test.ts
pnpm oxfmt --check ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.ts
pnpm check:test-types
```

- Evidence after fix (screenshot, recording, terminal capture, console output, console output, redacted runtime log, linked artifact, or copied live output):

```json
{
  "scenario": "loadChatHistory with inFlightRun after session switch-back",
  "before": { "chatRunId": null, "chatStream": null },
  "after": {
    "chatRunId": "run-bg",
    "chatStream": "still working in the background",
    "chatStreamStartedAt": "<number>"
  }
}
```

- Observed result after fix: `loadChatHistory` sets `chatRunId` and `chatStream` from `inFlightRun`; empty buffered text adopts run with `chatStream=""` for reading-indicator state.
- What was not tested: Live browser Control UI navigation; active tool-call replay mid-run.
- Proof limitations or environment constraints: L2 vitest only — no live gateway/browser repro in this environment. `pnpm check:changed` requires Blacksmith Testbox (`crabbox`) unavailable locally.
- Before evidence (optional but encouraged): Before patch, `loadChatHistory` cleared stream state and never read `res.inFlightRun`, leaving `chatRunId`/`chatStream` null after switch-back.

## Tests and validation

Which commands did you run?

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.test.ts` — 119 passed
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts` — 65 passed
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/app-gateway.node.test.ts` — 104 passed
- `pnpm oxfmt --check ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.ts` — pass
- `pnpm check:test-types` — pass

What regression coverage was added or updated?

- `loadChatHistory inFlightRun adoption` — buffered text restore + empty-text reading-indicator adoption.

What failed before this fix, if known?

- `chatRunId` stayed null after history reload despite gateway `inFlightRun` payload.

If no test was added, why not?

- N/A — regression tests added.

## Risk checklist

Did user-visible behavior change? (`Yes/No`)

Yes. Returning to a running session now shows in-progress assistant output instead of appearing idle.

Did config, environment, or migration behavior change? (`Yes/No`)

No.

Did security, auth, secrets, network, or tool execution behavior change? (`Yes/No`)

No.

What is the highest-risk area?

- Interaction between history stream reset and in-flight adoption when local stream state already exists.

How is that risk mitigated?

- Adoption runs after existing reset logic; existing orphaned-stream materialization tests unchanged; new focused adoption tests added.

## Current review state

What is the next action?

- Await maintainer / ClawSweeper review.

What is still waiting on author, maintainer, CI, or external proof?

- CI on fork PR; optional live browser proof if maintainer requests.

Which bot or reviewer comments were addressed?

- N/A — initial submission.
target.author: liuwqgit
